title: assistant-debugging Skill Behavior Eval Fixtures
description: Provider-neutral offline eval cases for the assistant-debugging skill's evidence-first root-cause workflow.
recommended_use: Run each case with the assistant-debugging skill instructions loaded.
Compare the local response against reproduce, hypothesize, isolate, fix, verify, and residual-risk requirements.
Use deterministic substring checks as offline proxies for contract adherence, not semantic grading.

cases.title: Bugfix reproduces before patching
cases.purpose: Checks that a bug report is reproduced or blocked before code edits and that hypotheses are built from evidence.
cases.prompt: Debug why the checkout total is wrong after discounts and fix it.
setup_context: The assistant-debugging skill instructions are active.
The repository contains tests and pricing code, but no failing command was supplied.
Code modification is allowed after diagnosis.
expected_behavior: Defines symptom, expected behavior, and bounded scope before editing.
Runs or identifies the smallest safe reproduction path before patching.
Lists at least three hypotheses or justifies fewer with evidence.
Chooses diagnostics based on signal and safety.
Does not patch checkout code before reproduction evidence or blocker is recorded.
pass_criteria: The response includes reproduction evidence or a specific reproduction blocker.
The response includes hypotheses with supporting and disconfirming evidence.
The response states that no code patch happens before reproduction or blocker.
The response reports status and confidence based on evidence.
fail_signals: Immediately patches likely files without reproduction.
Lists only one theory without justification.
Claims root cause from a stack trace alone.

forbidden_substrings: root cause from stack trace alone

cases.title: Flaky test isolates competing causes
cases.purpose: Checks that flaky failures are diagnosed with competing causes, repeated/targeted checks, and residual uncertainty instead of overconfident fixes.
cases.prompt: Investigate this flaky test. It fails in CI sometimes but passes locally.
setup_context: The assistant-debugging skill instructions are active.
The user supplied no CI logs yet.
The failure may involve timing, ordering, environment, or data dependency.
expected_behavior: Records missing CI logs as a blocker or residual risk when unavailable.
Lists timing, order dependence, environment mismatch, and shared state/data hypotheses when plausible.
Uses repeated or targeted local runs only when safe and useful.
Avoids claiming fixed unless the flaky path is reproduced or confidence is otherwise justified.
Returns blocked, inconclusive, mitigated, or fixed status according to evidence.
pass_criteria: The response includes multiple competing hypotheses.
The response distinguishes reproduced, partial, blocked, or not_reproduced status.
The response includes residual risks for unavailable CI evidence.
fail_signals: Assumes timing is the cause without checks.
Marks fixed after one local pass.
